recovery_rule: On the defense call, a candidate who correctly explains a tripped landmine (what broke, why, and what the fix is) recovers up to 60% of its weight. A candidate who defends the broken code, or cannot read it, recovers nothing. Stretch-goal bonus points never offset tripped landmines: depth does not buy back discipline.
notes: Weights are the starting point from docs/03-evaluation.md and are meant to be recalibrated over time in this file, not in detector code. functional_breakdown sums to the 'functional' weight above (40) and is deliberately weighted toward acceptance criteria 1-5 (core semantics and concurrency) and 7 (determinism), per docs/03. landmines and process sum to 40 and 20, so the base score is out of 100; stretch adds up to 8 bonus points on top.
